summary: Base W6 — ~17 mpw (up from ~14, ~10% bump per §11.D), polarized ~85% Z1. Mon strides logged — cadence 180/178/196/180 spm, reps 1/2/4 held ≤180 (rep 4 textbook 180@6:00), rep 3 still overshot to 196 (Adj #24 mostly addressed → Adj #25). Tue T-pace re-test landed (Adj #16): 5×5 min @ 8:00/mi, cadence 180, HR 167/177/179/180/183 — peak 183 is the lowest T-effort peak in the log under restored standard ordering, so HR backs holding 8:00/mi; RPE wasn't reported so the RPE-gate is not formally closed (Adj #26), and Hyp A PM is still to log (Incline 135→140 if clean). Sat is the big bump day: lat 145 (restore full 4 sets, Adj #17), chest-supp row 85 (Adj #18), cable lat 20/side (Adj #19), seated calf 335 (Adj #22), plus two holds-until-clean (preacher 55 Adj #21, tri pushdown 52.5 Adj #20) and soleus restore + push duration (owed twice — Adj #14/#23). SI confirmed clean throughout (≥3 consecutive clean weeks), so the hill-stride SI gate is now satisfied — hill strides eligible W7 Mon; held in W6 only to avoid stacking a new NM stimulus on the first mileage-bump week (§11.D) and to re-establish flat-stride cadence (Adj #24/#25). Run-MHR retest still priority (Adj #9).

days.note: Logged — 4×20s flat strides, cadence 180/178/196/180 spm; reps 1/2/4 held ≤180 (rep 4 textbook 180@6:00/mi), rep 3 overshot to 196 like Fri 5/22. Adj #24 mostly addressed → Adj #25. Hill strides online W7. No lift.

Recovery aerobic; nasal gate is the reference (Adj #9), ignore off-191 ≤155 cap.
